title: Surge in China's Coal Imports From Indonesia and Russia
section_path: Surge in China's Coal Imports From Indonesia and Russia
section_path_text: Surge in China's Coal Imports From Indonesia and Russia
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Coal imports from Indonesia have remained China's primary source of imported coal. The most recently released data shows that Imports from Indonesia totaled 22 million tons in March. This is up from February by 5.5 million tons (33%) and up year-on-year by 12 million tons (120%).
